Text: Sticky Note

Text: Who's this 'Mr. Crocker' guy? And what is this about a warehouse?

Harper:"Hello. Have you seen my friend Vera?"|Strange Man:"I think I saw her at the bar a while ago."|Harper:"You did?! Do you know where she went?"|Strange Man:"No idea. She mentioned forgetting her phone at home."|Harper:"Yeah. I did find her phone. I thought it would make finding her easier."|Harper:"It hasn't been very useful so far though."|Strange Man: "You might be able to use it to track her."|Harper:"What do you mean?"| Strange Man:"She might have had a tracker on her that you can access through the phone. I could show you how to use it if you do something for me.”|Strange Man:"I lost my favourite poster in this alleyway some time ago."|Strange Man:"Bring me the poster and I'll show you how to use the GPS."
Harper:"Is this your poster?"| Strange Man:"Yes you found it! Now as promised - I'll set the GPS tracker up for you. The tracker is successfully enabled on Vera's phone."
There is a poster in the garbage bin. Maybe this could be it...
Harper:"Louise - Vera is missing."|Louise:"Missing? That doesn't sound like her."|Harper:"Have you heard from her at all?"|Louise:"No
column6: but she mentioned meeting someone recently."|Harper:"Who?"|Louise:"She didn't say. Just that it was important."|Harper:"Something's wrong. I can feel it."|Louise:"Then I'll help you figure it out. Have you figured out where she might be?"|Harper:"Not exactly. I think she might be at a warehouse but I don't know where."|Louise:"Hmm... Sometimes she hangs out at the warehouse on 5th street. Lets look there."

Text: Mr. Crocker:"You made it farther than I expected."|Mr. Crocker:"Most people turn back long before this point."|Harper:"Get to the point! Where is Vera?"|Mr. Crocker:"Ha ha! you are still asking the same question... even now."

Mr. Crocker:"You came all this way for one person."|Mr. Crocker:"That kind of obsession is predictable."|Harper:"If you hurt her..."|Mr. Crocker:"I didn’t hurt her. But do you want to see Vera?"|Harper:"Yes
column6: I do" |Mr. Crocker:"First prove yourself in the ring. If you can defeat me
column8: if not then I keep her."
